note: 本番 DB の storage.* RLS 現状。migration ファイルとの差分検知用。Dashboard での手動編集を検出する目的。

policies.polname: documents: admin or manager can manage
policies.using:
((bucket_id = 'documents'::text) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM employees
  WHERE ((employees.auth_user_id = auth.uid()) AND (employees.status = 'active'::text) AND (employees.role = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'manager'::text])) AND (((employees.tenant_id)::text = (storage.foldername(objects.name))[1]) OR ((employees.tenant_id)::text = (storage.foldername(objects.name))[2]))))))
policies.with_check:
((bucket_id = 'documents'::text) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM employees
  WHERE ((employees.auth_user_id = auth.uid()) AND (employees.status = 'active'::text) AND (employees.role = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'manager'::text])) AND (((employees.tenant_id)::text = (storage.foldername(objects.name))[1]) OR ((employees.tenant_id)::text = (storage.foldername(objects.name))[2]))))))

policies.using:
((bucket_id = 'documents'::text) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM employees
  WHERE ((employees.auth_user_id = auth.uid()) AND (employees.status = 'active'::text) AND (((employees.tenant_id)::text = (storage.foldername(objects.name))[1]) OR ((employees.tenant_id)::text = (storage.foldername(objects.name))[2]))))))

((bucket_id = 'employee-images'::text) AND ((storage.foldername(name))[1] = ( SELECT (employees.tenant_id)::text AS tenant_id
   FROM employees
  WHERE (employees.auth_user_id = auth.uid())
 LIMIT 1)))
policies.with_check:
((bucket_id = 'employee-images'::text) AND ((storage.foldername(name))[1] = ( SELECT (employees.tenant_id)::text AS tenant_id
   FROM employees
  WHERE (employees.auth_user_id = auth.uid())
 LIMIT 1)))

policies.using:
((bucket_id = 'issued-documents'::text) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM issued_documents id_rec
  WHERE ((id_rec.generated_pdf_path = objects.name) AND (is_own_issued_document(id_rec.employee_id) OR can_admin_view_issued_document(id_rec.facility_id, id_rec.tenant_id))))))

((bucket_id = 'message-attachments'::text) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (message_attachments a
     JOIN messages m ON ((m.id = a.message_id)))
  WHERE ((a.storage_path = objects.name) AND (m.sender_employee_id = ( SELECT employees.id
           FROM employees
          WHERE (employees.auth_user_id = auth.uid())
         LIMIT 1))))))

((bucket_id = 'message-attachments'::text) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (message_attachments a
     JOIN messages m ON ((m.id = a.message_id)))
  WHERE ((a.storage_path = objects.name) AND (is_message_thread_member(m.thread_id) OR can_admin_view_thread(m.thread_id))))))

policies.polname: videos: admin or manager can manage
policies.using:
((bucket_id = 'videos'::text) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM employees
  WHERE ((employees.auth_user_id = auth.uid()) AND (employees.status = 'active'::text) AND (employees.role = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'manager'::text])) AND ((employees.tenant_id)::text = (storage.foldername(objects.name))[2])))))
policies.with_check:
((bucket_id = 'videos'::text) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM employees
  WHERE ((employees.auth_user_id = auth.uid()) AND (employees.status = 'active'::text) AND (employees.role = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'manager'::text])) AND ((employees.tenant_id)::text = (storage.foldername(objects.name))[2])))))

policies.using:
((bucket_id = 'videos'::text) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM employees
  WHERE ((employees.auth_user_id = auth.uid()) AND (employees.status = 'active'::text) AND ((employees.tenant_id)::text = (storage.foldername(objects.name))[2])))))
